## Checklist

- [ ] Branch and commits follow the `SUSHITAP-<TYPE>/<Short-Description>` convention
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes with no errors
- [ ] Tested on an Android device or emulator
- [ ] Updated the README if user-facing behavior changed
